title: Barcelona Crosswind Final
subtitle: TEST SPAWN · LFML area · A330 · single JSON source of truth
description: All scenario values (position, IAS, aircraft, gear/flaps, weather) come from this JSON. A minimal .FLT is generated at start — no hand-maintained flight file required.
hudTips: Start free flight in A330-200 (RR) first — Challenge Lab will not hot-swap aircraft.
Start Challenge sets spawn, noon local time, weather, and gear safely.
Edit spawn / timeOfDay / weather in this JSON, then restart the challenge.
